---
title: "System freezes after playing a little..."
date: 2005-10-28
forum: General Help
---

### Post by .Danny on 2005-10-28
After playing Enemy Territory for a few minutes my system freezes. I can't do anything anymore, and neither the mouse nor the keyboard seem to respond. The only thing left is a hard restart.

This is my xorg.conf.

```
# /etc/X11/xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using
# values from the debconf database.
#
# Edit this file with caution, and see the /etc/X11/xorg.conf manual page.
# (Type "man /etc/X11/xorg.conf" at the shell prompt.)
#
# This file is automatically updated on xserver-xorg package upgrades *only*
# if it has not been modified since the last upgrade of the xserver-xorg
# package.
#
# If you have edited this file but would like it to be automatically updated
# again, run the following command:
#   sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg

Section "Files"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/misc"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/cyrillic"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/100dpi/:unscaled"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/75dpi/:unscaled"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/Type1"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/CID"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/100dpi"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/75dpi"
        # paths to defoma fonts
	FontPath	"/var/lib/defoma/x-ttcidfont-conf.d/dirs/TrueType"
	FontPath	"/var/lib/defoma/x-ttcidfont-conf.d/dirs/CID"
EndSection

Section "Module"
#	Load	"GLcore"
	Load	"i2c"
	Load	"bitmap"
	Load	"ddc"
#	Load	"dri"
	Load	"extmod"
	Load	"freetype"
	Load	"glx"
	Load	"int10"
	Load	"type1"
	Load	"vbe"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
	Identifier	"Generic Keyboard"
	Driver		"kbd"
	Option		"CoreKeyboard"
	Option		"XkbRules"	"xorg"
	Option		"XkbModel"	"pc104"
	Option		"XkbLayout"	"hr"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
        Identifier	"Configured Mouse"
        Driver		"mouse"
	Option		"Protocol"		"evdev"
	Option		"Dev Name"		"Logitech USB-PS/2 Optical Mouse"
	Option		"Dev Phys"		"usb-*/input0"
        Option		"Device"		"/dev/input/event3"
	Option		"Buttons"		"10"
	Option		"ZAxisMapping"		"4 5"
EndSection

Section "Device"
	Identifier	"NVIDIA Corporation NV40 [GeForce 6800 LE]"
	Driver		"nvidia"
	BusID		"PCI:3:0:0"
	Option		"AGPMode" "8"
	Option		"AGPFastWrite" "true"
	Option		"NoLogo" "true"
#	Option		"RenderAccel" "true"
	Option		"IgnoreDisplayDevices" "DFP,TV"
#	Option		"NoRenderExtension" "true"
	Option		"Accel" "true"
	Option		"AllowGLXWithComposite" "true"
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
	Identifier	"MCM 17P1"
	Option		"DPMS"
EndSection

Section "Screen"
	Identifier	"Default Screen"
	Device		"NVIDIA Corporation NV40 [GeForce 6800 LE]"
	Monitor		"MCM 17P1"
	DefaultDepth	24
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		1
		Modes		"1600x1200" "1280x1024" "1152x864" "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		4
		Modes		"1600x1200" "1280x1024" "1152x864" "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		8
		Modes		"1600x1200" "1280x1024" "1152x864" "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		15
		Modes		"1600x1200" "1280x1024" "1152x864" "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		16
		Modes		"1600x1200" "1280x1024" "1152x864" "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		24
		Modes		"1600x1200" "1280x1024" "1152x864" "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
EndSection

Section "ServerLayout"
	Identifier	"Default Layout"
	Screen		"Default Screen"
	InputDevice	"Generic Keyboard"
	InputDevice	"Configured Mouse"
EndSection

Section "DRI"
	Mode	0666
EndSection

```

And my Enemy Territory graphics config part.

```
// Graphics
echo "^7danny^0/^1/^7loading ^xgraphics"

seta r_gamma 2				// overall contrast

seta r_allowextensions "1"		//

seta r_drawentities "1"			//

seta r_drawfoliage "1"			//

seta r_showtris	"0"			//

seta r_showmodelbounds "0"		//

seta r_wolffog "1"			// Show fog

seta r_primitives "0"			// Try 5 and see, better FPS at 0

seta r_depthbits "0"			// 0 = Driver default (recommended)

seta r_colorbits "32"			// 16 bit *may* increase performance on older cards but not by much (and its ugly)

seta r_texturebits "32"			// Try setting your desktop bpp to match these for faster load times

seta r_inGameVideo "0"			// 

seta r_highQualityVideo "0"		//

seta r_fastsky "1"			// replace the sky with black

seta r_drawsun "0"			// disable rendering of the sun

seta r_dynamiclight "3"			// Default:1 Glowing circles around shooters / panzers / etc...

seta r_picmip "3"			// 0=Most detailed 3=Least detailed

seta r_vertexLight "3"			// Lights around dynomite 0 = off/dimmest 3 = brightest

seta r_mapoverbrightbits "2"		// light levels (Experiment with these to find a contrast you like)

seta r_overbrightbits "0"		// light levels

seta r_lightmap	"0"			// map light levels (0 = lightmap off 1 = lightmap on) (Must be 0 in ClanBase)

seta r_ignorehwgamma "1"		// Default:0 changes how the game looks (Curious? experiment with 1)

seta r_displayrefresh "85"		// Control the refresh rate (Check refresh rates for your resolution)

seta r_mode "-1"				// 8 = 1280 x 1024 7 = 1152x864 6 = 1024 x 768 4 = 800X600

seta r_customheight "948"		// Custom resolution height (works only with r_mode -1)

seta r_customwidth "1278"		// Custom resolution width (works only with r_mode -1)

seta r_subdivisions "999"		// Default:4

seta r_lodbias "2"			// -2= Most detail 2= Least

seta r_lodCurveError "100"		// Default:250

seta r_detailtextures "0"		// What it says

seta r_swapInterval "0"			// vsync

seta r_simpleMipMaps "0"		// boost fps (confusing cvar .. 0 is better performance than 1)

seta r_flares "0"			// I forget why but leave it at 0 =)

seta r_roundimagesdown "5"		// texture quality

seta r_ext_NV_fog_dist "0"		// Nvidia card setting

seta r_ignoreGLErrors "1"		// ?

seta r_ignoreFastPath "0"		// ? default 1 

seta r_finish "0"			// a debuging cvar leave it at 0 unless u have problems with kb/mouse

seta r_dlightbacks "1"			// 2-3fps gain?? (No-one else got this result I dunno what happened)

seta r_ext_texture_env_add "0"		// Default:1 (no change in fps)

seta r_uifullscreen "0"			// Default:0 Leave it at 0 (PB protected on most servers)

seta r_textureMode "GL_LINEAR_MIPMAP_NEAREST"

seta r_ext_compressed_textures "1"        // Default:1 Leave it!

seta r_ext_texture_filter_anisotropic "0" // disable anisotropic filter (u want this set to 0)

seta cg_shadows "0"
seta r_intensity "2.7" // overall brightness, default is 1, use 1.3 - tried 2.7
```

Anyone has some ideas? I'm running the nvidia drivers installed via apt-get on a GF6800LE.

### Post by .Danny on 2005-10-29
And second part, was to large for one post.

